case_title: MORGAN, JULIE vs. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORGAN, JULIE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-26-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-27-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-06-1995
NOTICE OF PENDING SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORGAN, JULIE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-26-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON APR-26-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-26-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
